User.title: User Profile
User.description: Represents a creator profile, including custom theme settings, view metrics, storage usage, and ban status.

id.description: The Firebase Auth unique user identifier (UID)

username.description: The unique creator username claimed by the user

avatarUrl.description: The URL of the creator's avatar image

provider.description: Auth provider used, e.g. google, discord, or email

views.description: Total profile views received by the creator

flagCount.description: Total suspension/flag count. Max 3 before automatic ban

flaggedAt.description: ISO timestamp indicating when the user was flagged/suspended

banned.description: Flag indicating if the user is permanently banned

bio.description: A short bio shown on the creator profile

themeId.description: ID of the visual theme template used for the profile page

backgroundMusicUrl.description: URL to background music audio file for the profile page

discordUrl.description: Optional link to the creator's Discord server or profile

twitterUrl.description: Optional link to the creator's Twitter/X profile

instagramUrl.description: Optional link to the creator's Instagram profile

githubUrl.description: Optional link to the creator's GitHub profile

storageUsed.description: Total storage bytes consumed by the creator's uploads. Max 3GB

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the account was registered

FileRecord.title: Shared File
FileRecord.description: Represents a file uploaded by a creator, including visibility, metrics, like counts, and storage locations.

name.description: The original name of the file

size.description: Size of the file in bytes

type.description: The category of the file: audio, image, video, 3d, or other

isPublic.description: Whether the file is visible on the public feed and creator page

fileUrl.description: The public storage download URL of the file

storagePath.description: The reference path inside Firebase Storage

uploaderUid.description: UID of the creator who uploaded the file

uploaderUsername.description: Username of the creator who uploaded the file

downloads.description: Number of downloads this file has received

likesCount.description: Total number of likes this file has received

reportsCount.description: Total reports submitted for this file

reportedBy.description: List of user UIDs who have reported this file

likedBy.description: List of user UIDs who have liked this file

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the file was uploaded

Template.title: Profile Template
Template.description: Represents custom layout templates created and shared by users.

bgColor.description: Primary background color of the template

createdBy.description: Name or UID of the creator who posted the template

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the template was posted

/users/{userId}.description: The collection storing all creator profile records, mapped by user UID

/files/{fileId}.description: The collection storing metadata for all uploaded files, mapped by file ID

/templates/{templateId}.description: Shared page templates posted by community members
